applicability_notes: Unary eltwise; supports in-place-style preallocated output_tensor and accuracy/approx mode selection. Accurate mode validated at pcc>=0.999. Frequently appears inside larger decomposed patterns: silu (x*sigmoid(x)), quick_gelu (t*sigmoid(1.702*t)), and swiglu gating (gate*sigmoid(alpha*gate)); prefer fused ttnn.silu / fused activation when the surrounding multiply matches those shapes.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.sigmoid(input_tensor, vector_mode={VECTOR_MODE}, mode={SIGMOID_MODE}, memory_config={MEMORY_CONFIG})

placement_observations.size_descriptor: activation tensor, height-shardable (H x W fits per-core L1 shard)
small SE-block scale tensor (batch, seq_len, channels) after reshape
placement_observations.source: call_site: y = ttnn.sigmoid(y, memory_config=dram) in squeeze-excite path

placement_observations.size_descriptor: router logits (1, 1, token_count, num_experts), small last dim
placement_observations.source: call_site: scores = ttnn.sigmoid(logits) after ttnn.linear gate projection (default interleaved memory config)
